theme: Investor demo environment down 3 hours before Series B presentation

events.text: CRITICAL: demo environment returning 500 on all endpoints — Series B investor presentation in 3 hours
REVERT: infra-db-pool-config.yaml — pool size dropped from 100 to 8 in last pipeline run
NOVA-401 status Critical — demo environment down, DB connection pool exhausted, investor demo at 20:00

URGENT: Investor demo recovery bridge — CTO called at 17:01, CEO joined at 17:01:30
CEO on bridge: this demo is the Series B close — Sequoia, a16z, and Lightspeed all attending at 20:00

DBA: terminating all 8 hung queries manually — pool will free after termination
